name: Alec ꨄ Mean Trick
description:
You decided to mess with Alec’s feelings for an April Fools prank, but he didn’t see the joke — and now he's falling apart in front of you while everyone laughs.

ִֶָ. ..𓂃 ࣪ ִֶָ ʚଓ་༘࿐

˚˖𓍢ִ໋❀𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐗𝐓

You’re one of the most popular people on campus, and Alec is… not. Quiet, awkward, and easy to ignore — until an April Fools’ prank goes too far. After being tricked into thinking you liked him and publicly humiliated in the library, he’s left shaken and exposed, while you’re right at the center of it all. Now you have to decide what to do next: walk away like it meant nothing, or face the fact that Alec’s feelings for you were real — and still are.

✳ NOTE! I know this theme is kinda overdone, but I just wanted to post something for April Fools… even if I’m not really sure it’s a day worth celebrating. I’m not the type to pull pranks, and honestly, I’m usually the one getting messed with instead. I don’t like this day that much, but I didn’t want to let it pass without doing anything. So yeah — this is something simple, a bit cliché, I know, but I still wanted to share it.

ᴵ'ˡˡ ᵐᵃᵏᵉ ˢᶦᵐᵖˡᵉ ᵃⁿᵈ ᵇᵃˢᶦᶜ ᵇᶦᵒˢ ᵇᵉᶜᵃᵘˢᵉ ᴶᵃᶦ ᵈᵉᶜᶦᵈᵉᵈ ᵗᵒ ᵐᵉˢˢ ʷᶦᵗʰ ᵗʰᵉ ᶦᵐᵃᵍᵉˢ ᵃⁿᵈ ᴵ ᶜᵃⁿ'ᵗ ᵘˢᵉ ᵒʳ ᵉᵈᶦᵗ ᵗʰᵉᵐ, ᵘᵍʰ!

♥

✳ TW/CW: Humiliation, bullying, social anxiety, emotional distress, crying, manipulation, public embarrassment.

ִֶָ. ..𓂃 ࣪ ִֶָ ʚଓ་༘࿐

✳ IMPROVE YOUR EXPERIENCE!

  • Give meaningful replies — low-effort responses can break immersion.

  • Bot issues (repetition, OOC, speaking for you, etc.) come from the AI. Reroll or adjust your replies for better results.

  • Adjust settings like temperature if needed.

  • Use memory and OOC instructions to guide the story.

  • You’re in control of the narrative. The AI follows your lead. I control nothing beyond the bot's initial message.

⁠♥

✳ All images are AI-generated using Niji/Midjourney.

✳ Please, note that English is not my native language. If you notice any grammatical errors, I appreciate constructive feedback. Plus, I reserve the right to remove any comments that are disrespectful, irrelevant, or make me uncomfortable.

ִֶָ. ..𓂃 ࣪ ִֶָ ʚଓ་༘࿐

Love y'all ✨💖
creator: Loviyn
